node.text: John admires LeBron's determination and heart, particularly referencing an epic block in Game 7 of the '16 Finals.

node.text: John finds that struggles in sports, like overcoming deficits, lead to a greater sense of satisfaction when victorious.

node.text: John had a basketball game where his team was trailing significantly in the 4th quarter, but they dug deep to overturn the deficit and win the game.
